calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-12-2018 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-12-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 501 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Laura Reding, CSR 711. Telephone: 415-551-0333.

Kaquishka Turner, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Esq.
Leslie Valdez, Supportive Housing Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Don White.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on January 22, 2018.
Defendant's answer was filed on January 26, 2018.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was served on February 21, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc., and against defendant Don White, as follows:

Plaintiff is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the property located at 445 O'Farrell Street, Room, #324, San Francisco, CA 94102.

The rental agreement is canceled and the lease is forfeited.

Proposed Judgment for Possession Only was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-08-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Frank Burke, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is present, represented by Leslie Valdez.
Attorney Kaquishka Turner for the plaintiff.
Defendant is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there is no appearance by defendant. The trial date of March 12, 2018 remains on calendar.
